name: Project 02 - Real Support RAG Intake, OpenRouter Drafting, Approval Routing

parameters.content: Real Integration Mode skeleton. Gmail label trigger creates support tickets, stores them in PostgreSQL, retrieves approved KB content, uses OpenRouter for classification/drafting, and routes to approval or escalation.

nodes.name: Sticky Note - Support RAG Production Flow
Gmail Trigger - New Labeled Support Email
Code - Normalize Gmail Message To Ticket

parameters.query: INSERT INTO support_tickets (external_ticket_id, customer_email, channel, priority, subject, message, status) VALUES ('{{$json.external_ticket_id}}', '{{$json.customer_email}}', 'gmail', '{{$json.priority}}', '{{$json.subject}}', '{{$json.message}}', 'new') ON CONFLICT (external_ticket_id) DO UPDATE SET updated_at = NOW() RETURNING id;
SELECT id, title, body FROM knowledge_base_articles WHERE active = TRUE ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 5;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: $env.OPENROUTER_MODEL, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are a SaaS support triage agent. Return strict JSON only with category, confidence, matched_article_title, drafted_reply, risk_flags, route. Route must be approval or escalation. Escalate refunds, billing disputes, complaints, SSO/security, legal, and low confidence.' }, { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify({ ticket: $('Code - Normalize Gmail Message To Ticket').first().json, kb_articles: $json }) } ], response_format: { type: 'json_object' } } }}

nodes.name: OpenRouter - Classify Ticket And Draft Reply
Code - Validate AI Route And Guardrails

parameters.query: UPDATE support_tickets SET category='{{$json.category}}', confidence={{$json.confidence}}, route='{{$json.route}}', risk_flags='{{ JSON.stringify($json.risk_flags) }}'::text[], status='triaged', updated_at=NOW() WHERE external_ticket_id='{{$json.external_ticket_id}}';

nodes.name: IF - High Confidence Safe For Human Approval

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Approve support draft: ' + $('Code - Validate AI Route And Guardrails').first().json.subject }}

nodes.name: Gmail - Human Approval For Support Draft

parameters.query: INSERT INTO approval_tasks (source_type, approver_email, approval_payload) VALUES ('support_reply', '{{$env.SUPPORT_REVIEWER_EMAIL}}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json) }}'::jsonb);

INSERT INTO workflow_errors (n8n_execution_id, workflow_name, node_name, severity, error_message, payload_reference) VALUES ('{{$execution.id}}', 'Project 02 - Support RAG', 'IF - High Confidence Safe For Human Approval', 'warning', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.risk_flags) }}', '{{$json.external_ticket_id}}');

SELECT category, route, COUNT(*) AS ticket_count, AVG(confidence) AS avg_confidence FROM support_tickets WHERE updated_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day' GROUP BY category, route ORDER BY category, route;

main.node: Code - Normalize Gmail Message To Ticket
OpenRouter - Classify Ticket And Draft Reply
Code - Validate AI Route And Guardrails
IF - High Confidence Safe For Human Approval
Gmail - Human Approval For Support Draft
